title: file-uploaded event — v1 wire contract
description: FROZEN wire shape for the `storage::FileUploaded` event. Emitted afterCommit on File row creation with virus_scan_state=pending. Every consumer (search indexer, variant generator, activity log, compliance recorder, webhook fan-out) reads this shape unchanged. Breaking changes require a v2 per the versioning policy in `foundation/readme.md` §12.

x-versioning.policy: Additive changes stay in v1. Breaking changes create v2 with parallel dispatch through a deprecation cycle (see foundation/readme.md §12).

x-volume: medium (~1-10 events / tenant / hour on active tenants; higher during migrations)

event_id.description: ULID identifier for this event instance. Dedup + idempotency by downstream consumers.

owner_id.description: Uploader's user ULID. Null for system uploads.

fileable_type.description: Polymorphic parent morph type. Null for standalone files.

virus_scan_state.description: At event time the state is `pending` or (rarely) `scanning`; `clean` appears only for uploads that bypass scan (system uploads with requires_virus_scan=false).

expected_variants.description: Variant keys the file's kind will produce async (from #[FileKind(generates_variants)]). Consumers waiting for a specific variant can subscribe to FileVariantsCompleted instead.

tenant.description: Denormalised tenant context. Consumers can render without a callback.
